The PR adds plugin Control UI app-nav entry points across the Plugin SDK, registry, gateway protocol/RPC handlers, launch-token HTTP auth, and Control UI iframe navigation, with docs and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: source inspection shows raw Plugin UI path containment diverges from canonical plugin route matching; not applicable as a current-main bug reproduction for the requested feature.
